zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI於1039年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南時，他的父親Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé24歲，母親Almodis de La Marché19歲。他於1065年與Hildegarde De Thouars在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1087年登記服兵役。他去世於1102年5月18日在巴勒斯坦享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI于1039年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南时，他的父亲Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé24岁，母亲Almodis de La Marché19岁。他于1065年与Hildegarde De Thouars在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1087年登记服兵役。他去世于1102年5月18日在巴勒斯坦享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: March
meanings: English: habitational name from March (Cambridgeshire) or from any of numerous minor English placenames deriving from Middle English marche ‘boundary’ (partly from Old English mearc in the dative-case form mearce, partly from Old French marche). Compare Mark 2.
Catalan: from the personal name March, Catalan equivalent of Mark 1. This surname is also found in southern France.
German: topographic name from Middle Low German march, Middle High German marc(h) ‘mark, sign, boundary’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word (Bavaria).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: From the classical Greek name Zēnōn, a short form of any of several names beginning with Zēn-, the stem form of the name of Zeus, king of the gods, for example Zēnodōros ‘gift of Zeus’. Zeno was the name of two major Greek philosophers and a Christian Eastern Roman emperor ( d. 491 ). Zeno of Elea ( c.490–430 bc ) was an original thinker who challenged common-sense notions like motion and number with sophisticated logical arguments. Zeno of Citium ( c.334–262 bc ) was the founder of the Stoics.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI was born in 1039, in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé, was 24 and his mother, Almodis de La Marché, was 19. He married Hildegarde De Thouars in 1065, in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1087. He died on 18 May 1102, in Palestine, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI est né en 1039, à Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Almodis de La Marché, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Hildegarde De Thouars en 1065, à Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1087. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1102, à Palestine, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI 1039 in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé 24 und seine Mutter Almodis de La Marché 19. Er hat 1065 in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Hildegarde De Thouars geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1087 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 18. Mai 1102 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI è nato il nel 1039 nel Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Almodis de La Marché, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Hildegarde De Thouars nel 1065, nel Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1087. Morì il 18 maggio 1102, nel Palestina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VIが1039年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンルシグナンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhéは24歳，母Almodis de La Marchéは19歳であった。1065年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスソウアルズでHildegarde De Thouarsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1087年に兵役登録をした。彼は1102年5月18日にパレスチナで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI(이)가 1039년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Almodis de La Marché(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1065년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 토우아르스에서 Hildegarde De Thouars(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1087년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1102년 5월 18일 팔레스타인에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI nasceu em 1039, em Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Almodis de La Marché, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Hildegarde De Thouars em 1065, em Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1087. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1102, em Palestina, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI родился в 1039 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Almodis de La Marché, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Hildegarde De Thouars в 1065 г. в местности тоуарс, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1087 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 18 мая 1102 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI nació en 1039, en Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Lusignan V, Seigneur de Lusignan et de Couhé, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Almodis de La Marché, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Hildegarde De Thouars en 1065, en Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1087. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1102, en Palestina, a la edad de 63 años.
